Title: Olio
Category: Poetry
Price: 23.88 GBP
Availability: In stock (19 available)
Description: Part fact, part fiction, Tyehimba Jess's much anticipated second book weaves sonnet, song, and narrative to examine the lives of mostly unrecorded African American performers directly before and after the Civil War up to World War I.
